response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified it as a promotion for 'hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE: CHROMATIC FUTURE'. The first segment is a live concert performance by Hololive Indonesia virtual talents. The song performed is in English but I could not find a specific song title or official lyrics through web searches despite trying relevant keywords related to the event name. The rest of the video (after 00:54) is a slideshow advertisement for official merchandise for the event, including panels, stands, badges, lanyards, and t-shirts. Since no song title or lyrics could be found, I have marked those fields as null.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the 'hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE: CHROMATIC FUTURE' concert, featuring a live performance of a song followed by an advertisement showcasing official concert merchandise.

scenes.description: A group of Hololive Indonesia virtual talents perform a song on a stage with concert lighting and a cheering crowd holding lightsticks. The song has English lyrics.
scenes.song_title: Unknown song from Hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE
